title: Farewell to Mohamed Salah, Liverpool's 'Egyptian king'
description: As Mohamed Salah's time at Liverpool comes to an end, a look at his legacy with insight from Jurgen Klopp, Ian Rush, Steven Gerrard and more.
content:
Perhaps the fullest realisation of what Mohamed Salah has achieved at Liverpool will only come with time.
But as he prepares to say his goodbyes on Sunday, there is plenty to appreciate and admire in the here and now.

title: Iran 'getting a lot closer' to agreement with US, Trump says
description: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.
content:
US President Donald Trump has said Iran is "getting a lot closer" to reaching an agreement with the US on the war, as Tehran also signalled progress had been made in the past week.

title: Red Cross volunteers die from suspected Ebola in DR Congo
description: They are thought to have caught the virus before the outbreak was identified, the Red Cross says.
content:
Three Red Cross volunteers died in the Democratic Republic of Congo from suspected Ebola likely caught while managing dead bodies, the organisation has said.
They are believed to have contracted Ebola on 27 March while working in the eastern region o... [2524 chars]

title: LIVE: F1 Canadian Grand Prix updates - Kimi Antonelli on top after first Q2 runs as Charles Leclerc struggles
description: Follow along for lap-by-lap updates from Formula 1 qualifying at the Canadian Grand Prix
content:

title: Andy Robertson, Mohamed Salah and their nine trophies won at LFC
description: Andy Robertson and Mohamed Salah took a moment to mark the winning of nine trophies together ahead of their departure from Liverpool.
content:
The Scot and the Egyptian will bid farewell to the Reds at Sunday’s Premier League season finale, against Brentford at Anfield.
On the eve of their goodbye, Robertson and Salah came together for a special photograph alongside all the honours they won... [275 chars]
